ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, bond, currency) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is denominated */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures */,
  "sedol" TEXT /* Stock Exchange Daily Official List */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the issuer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the instrument information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to which the data point belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data point */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "highest_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "lowest_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument on the given date */,
  "pre_close_price" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  "trading_status" TEXT /* Status of trading (e.g., open, closed, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the market data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technical_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to which the indicator belongs */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator (e.g., moving average, relative strength index) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the indicator was calculated */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the indicator */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the indicator value was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technical_indicators_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moving_averages" (
  "ma_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moving average */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to which the moving average belongs */,
  "ma_type" TEXT /* Type of moving average (e.g., simple, exponential) */,
  "ma_value" REAL /* Value of the moving average */,
  "ma_period" INTEGER /* Period of the moving average (e.g., 50-day, 200-day) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the moving average was calculated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the moving average value was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ma_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moving_averages_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relative_strength_index" (
  "rsi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relative strength index value */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to which the relative strength index value belongs */,
  "rsi_value" REAL /* Value of the relative strength index */,
  "rsi_period" INTEGER /* Period of the relative strength index (e.g., 14-day, 28-day) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the RSI was calculated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the RSI value was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relative_strength_index_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bollinger_bands" (
  "bb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Bollinger Bands value */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to which the Bollinger Bands value belongs */,
  "bb_value" REAL /* Value of the Bollinger Bands */,
  "bb_period" INTEGER /* Period of the Bollinger Bands (e.g., 20-day, 50-day) */,
  "bb_std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the Bollinger Bands */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the Bollinger Bands were calculated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the Bollinger Bands value was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bollinger_bands_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last user login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the market data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the access log was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foreign_buy" (
  "fb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foreign buy data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to which the foreign buy data point belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the foreign buy data point */,
  "foreign_buy_value" REAL /* Value of the foreign buy */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the foreign buy data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the foreign buy data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foreign_buy_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "foreign_sell" (
  "fs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each foreign sell data point */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument to which the foreign sell data point belongs */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the foreign sell data point */,
  "foreign_sell_value" REAL /* Value of the foreign sell */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the foreign sell data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the foreign sell data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_foreign_sell_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
